title: Dynamic Light Sources
description: Make campfires, candles and torchflowers react to the day/night cycle
body:
# Dynamic Light Sources [1.21.8]

## ⚠️Archived. Please see [Dynamic Campfires](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dynamic-campfires)

This Datapack adds a new craftable item called the "Dynamic Light Tool" which can make campfires, candles and torchflowers react to the time of day! (Turn on at dusk, off at dawn)

You can craft it with a **Daylight Detector**, **Redstone Lamp** & **Redstone Torch**

![showcase gif](https://i.postimg.cc/zXxb4sd4/dynamic-lights-datapack-showcase-gif.gif)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_SHG1zkCtkM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
